---
title: "Ananya Mahadeva"
subtitle: "MSc Business Analytics | Data Enthusiast | Dublin, Ireland"
image: image/ananya.png
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 16em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ananya-mahadeva/
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ananya@example.com
---

## Welcome {.text-right}

Hi, I'm **Ananya Mahadeva** — a passionate data analyst and MSc Business Analytics student at a leading Dublin university. I love turning raw data into meaningful insights.

## What I Do {.text-left}

::: {layout-ncol=3}

![Data Analysis](image/data-analysis.png){fig-alt="Data Analysis" width=100%}

![Machine Learning](image/ml.png){fig-alt="Machine Learning" width=100%}

![Visualisation](image/viz.png){fig-alt="Visualisation" width=100%}

:::

## Core Skills {.text-right}

| Skill | Tools |
|---|---|
| Data Analysis | Python, Excel, SQL |
| Visualisation | Power BI, Plotly, Matplotlib |
| Machine Learning | Scikit-learn, Pandas |
| Web Publishing | Quarto, GitHub Pages |
| Version Control | Git, GitHub |

## Quick Highlights {.text-left}

::: {.callout-tip}
## Currently
- Studying **MSc Business Analytics** in Dublin
- Building this ePortfolio with Quarto & GitHub Pages
- Seeking part-time roles in retail & data analytics
:::

::: {.callout-note}
## Fun Fact
I processed over 10,000 rows of fraud detection data for my dissertation project using Python!
:::
